name: solid-scope-go-interface
doc: The `solid` plugin scope in isolation (solid-pre.ts). The scope short-circuits in handlePre to the solid-scope gates ONLY: the PreToolUse file-size ceiling (solid-file-size-gate.ts, same policy as core's evaluate.ts, without the APEX freshness gates), then validateSolidGate — a Go/Python interface-location check gated behind SOLID_PROJECT_TYPE. A top-level Go interface outside /interfaces/ is denied; the same interface INSIDE internal/interfaces/ is allowed.

steps.doc: Go interface outside /interfaces/ → GO_INTERFACE_RE matches (validate-solid.ts:16,22-23) → deny "SOLID: Interfaces must be in internal/interfaces/".
Same interface INSIDE internal/interfaces/ → checkGo early-returns null (validate-solid.ts:22 `filePath.includes("/interfaces/")`) → validateSolidGate returns "" → allow.
